InviteMessageTemplate.EmailSubject: You've been invited to UK fuel price tracker
InviteMessageTemplate.EmailMessage:
Welcome to UK fuel price tracker

The Guardian's investigations and reporting team have created an account for you on their UK fuel price tracker dashboard. It's a tool for exploring and analysing live fuel prices across the UK, using data from the UK government's Fuel Finder service.

Your login details:

  • Username: {username}
  • Temporary password: {####}

Sign in at fuel.hoy.la and you'll be prompted to set a new password on first login.

If you weren't expecting this email, you can safely ignore it.

This invitation was sent by an administrator of UK fuel price tracker.
